message: Plan this week for first supermarket pilot

response.summary: Local mode response for: Plan this week for first supermarket pilot

priorities.title: Book first 3 supermarket manager meetings
priorities.why: No pilot can start without discovery meetings.

priorities.title: Launch a 4-week founding pilot offer
priorities.why: Need first measurable outcome case study.

priorities.title: Publish 5 frontline behavior content pieces this week
priorities.why: Build authority while pipeline is being opened.

delegations.task: Map top 20 supermarkets in target region and classify by branch count.
delegations.expected_output: Prioritized target list with contact paths.

delegations.task: Draft first 8 micro-lessons for cashier and floor staff conflict scenarios.

risks.risk: Trying to build full app before validating pilot demand.
risks.mitigation: Sell and run pilot first; app scope follows validated pain points.

questions: Which city/region should be the first supermarket pilot market?
